variants.title: DMD126B60B
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec DMD126B60B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the DMD126B60B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Media: Wire Mesh, Efficiency 1: 60µ, Outer Diameter: 45.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 25.4 mm, Length: 113.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 16 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 60µ, Media Type: Wire Mesh, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 16 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: DMD126B60B
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard ST1371 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Filtrec DMD126B60B
variants.description: Fleetguard® ST1371 hydraulic cartridge filter with wire mesh media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.

variants.title: DMD126B60B
variants.option1Value: MicroFit MFHLP30561 | Replaces the Filtrec DMD126B60B
variants.description: Genuine MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP30561 filter. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30561 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MicroFit® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MicroFit® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
